title: To The Cannon "Victor Hugo."
content:
[Bought with the proceeds of Readings of "Les Ch�timents" during the Siege of Paris.]

    [1872.]


    Thou deadly crater, moulded by my muse,
    Cast thou thy bronze into my bowed and wounded heart,
    And let my soul its vengeance to thy bronze impart!
meaning:
Victor-Marie Hugo's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To The Cannon "Victor Hugo.""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
